title: astragalus caspicus
intro: Astragalus caspicus, also known as Caspian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Western China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus caspicus is believed to offer various health benefits, such as enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be consumed as a tea or supplement, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
